name_en: 🆕 【 M83226 White Flower 】 This Zippy coin wallet features the iconic Monogram canvas, known for its compact and small size that fits easily into pockets or small bags, while providing everyday functions. Engraved zipper ensures security, and the wide opening makes it easy to access coins, cards, and folded bills. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width) C
